case_title: MINNEQUA WORKS CREDIT UNION VS. RICHARD A AVERY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF STEVEN A. BOOSKA RE ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINNEQUA WORKS CREDIT UNION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINNEQUA WORKS CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVERY, RICHARD A $4,991.57 PRINCIPAL, $461.69 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,606.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
